addOnNote: Tables and chairs are available as add-ons with inflatable rentals, foam parties, 360 Photo Booth bookings, lawn games, and party packages.
standaloneNote: Standalone table and chair rentals are available by quote. A minimum rental order applies before travel.
confirmationNote: Availability, quantity, delivery, and final pricing are confirmed manually based on your date, location, and order size.
